phrases.cultural_note: RegioJet operates a separate counter, distinct from Czech Railways (ČD) ticket windows.

likely_response.local: Vlevo od hlavního vchodu, vedle pokladen.
likely_response.translation_en: To the left of the main entrance, next to the ticket offices.

responses.english: To the left of the main entrance, next to the ticket offices.
responses.french: Vlevo od hlavního vchodu, vedle pokladen.

phrases.intent_en: When does the Prague train leave?
phrases.cultural_note: Dispatchers often combine departure time and platform number in a single, terse reply.

likely_response.local: Za deset minut z druhého nástupiště.
likely_response.translation_en: In ten minutes from platform two.

responses.english: In ten minutes from platform two.
responses.french: Za deset minut z druhého nástupiště.

phrases.intent_en: Where do I pay for luggage storage?
phrases.cultural_note: Payment is typically made directly at the luggage storage counter, not at the main ticket office.

likely_response.local: U okénka úschovny, hned vedle vchodu.
likely_response.translation_en: At the luggage storage window, right next to the entrance.

responses.english: At the luggage storage window, right next to the entrance.
responses.french: U okénka úschovny, hned vedle vchodu.

phrases.cultural_note: Small station buffets in Czechia often operate cash-only and may not accept foreign currency.

phrases.text_local: Jak se dostanu na první nástupiště?
phrases.cultural_note: All platform access at this station is via the underpass, as there is no level crossing.

likely_response.translation_en: Through the underpass, the stairs are straight ahead.

responses.english: Through the underpass, the stairs are straight ahead.
